name: Dual Control Racing Stunt 3D
description: Ever wish to be a furious car driver in extreme driving games and drive awesome cars in the mountain? So enjoy the best car games that you have never play before. Car driving simulator games are one of the most played car games in the play store. Adrenaline will rush through your bone in these casual driving games. The car game include many 3d cars to keep you in this car master game. Stunning features are also included in this car games simulator to fulfill your desire to be the gt car master. Some obstacle will help you in the race car game 3d to find out your car love. Your main goal in car games is to win the racing championship.
